title: Nates performance
description: this modpack will give you the best performance possible with all the performance mods packed in one.
body:
this modpack will make your game run with the highest fps known to man. if you want to add shaders you can it comes with some already installed.


when you install nates performance all you have to do is launch Minecraft customize the settings to what you like and boom you can load up into a world or play on your Favret server with your fps super high.



before downloading I recommend you get the modrinth launcher for this modpack to work the best.

anyway, thats all I hope you enjoy this modpack you will find your fps over double what it used to be.
